# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - name: app-network
    type: compute.v1.network
    properties:
      autoCreateSubnetworks: false

  - name: app-subnet
    type: compute.v1.subnetwork
    properties:
      region: us-central1
      network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
      ipCidrRange: 10.10.0.0/24

  - name: app-firewall-ssh
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
      sourceRanges:
        - 0.0.0.0/0
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports:
            - "22"
      targetTags:
        - app-vm

  - name: app-firewall-http
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
      sourceRanges:
        - 0.0.0.0/0
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports:
            - "80"
            - "443"
      targetTags:
        - app-vm

  - name: app-service-account
    type: iam.v1.serviceAccount
    properties:
      accountId: app-vm-sa
      displayName: App VM Service Account

  - name: app-storage-bucket
    type: storage.v1.bucket
    properties:
      location: US
      storageClass: STANDARD
      versioning:
        enabled: true
      lifecycle:
        rule:
          - action:
              type: Delete
            condition:
              age: 30

  - name: app-db-instance
    type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
    properties:
      region: us-central1
      databaseVersion: POSTGRES_15
      settings:
        tier: db-custom-1-3840
        availabilityType: ZONAL
        backupConfiguration:
          enabled: true
          binaryLogEnabled: false
          startTime: "02:00"
        ipConfiguration:
          ipv4Enabled: true
          authorizedNetworks:
            - value: 0.0.0.0/0

  - name: app-db-user
    type: sqladmin.v1beta4.user
    properties:
      name: appuser
      instance: $(ref.app-db-instance.name)
      password: changeme-strong-password

  - name: app-db
    type: sqladmin.v1beta4.database
    properties:
      name: appdb
      instance: $(ref.app-db-instance.name)

  - name: app-vm
    type: compute.v1.instance
    properties:
      zone: us-central1-a
      machineType: zones/us-central1-a/machineTypes/e2-medium
      tags:
        items:
          - app-vm
      serviceAccounts:
        - email: $(ref.app-service-account.email)
          scopes:
            - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform
      disks:
        - deviceName: boot
          boot: true
          autoDelete: true
          initializeParams:
            sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-12
      networkInterfaces:
        - subnetwork: $(ref.app-subnet.selfLink)
          accessConfigs:
            - name: External NAT
              type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
      metadata:
        items:
          - key: startup-script
            value: |
              #!/bin/bash
              set -euxo pipefail
              apt-get update
              apt-get install -y nginx
              systemctl enable nginx
              systemctl restart nginx

  - name: app-lb-ip
    type: compute.v1.globalAddress
    properties:
      name: app-lb-ip

  - name: app-backend-service
    type: compute.v1.backendService
    properties:
      loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL
      protocol: HTTP
      portName: http
      timeoutSec: 30
      healthChecks:
        - $(ref.app-health-check.selfLink)
      backends:
        - group: $(ref.app-instance-group.selfLink)

  - name: app-health-check
    type: compute.v1.httpHealthCheck
    properties:
      port: 80
      requestPath: /

  - name: app-instance-group
    type: compute.v1.instanceGroup
    properties:
      zone: us-central1-a
      network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
      namedPorts:
        - name: http
          port: 80

  - name: app-instance-group-membership
    type: compute.v1.instanceGroupManager
    properties:
      zone: us-central1-a
      baseInstanceName: app-vm
      instanceTemplate: $(ref.app-instance-template.selfLink)
      targetSize: 1
      namedPorts:
        - name: http
          port: 80

  - name: app-instance-template
    type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
    properties:
      properties:
        machineType: e2-medium
        tags:
          items:
            - app-vm
        serviceAccounts:
          - email: $(ref.app-service-account.email)
            scopes:
              - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform
        disks:
          - boot: true
            autoDelete: true
            initializeParams:
              sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-12
        networkInterfaces:
          - subnetwork: $(ref.app-subnet.selfLink)
            accessConfigs:
              - name: External NAT
                type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
        metadata:
          items:
            - key: startup-script
              value: |
                #!/bin/bash
                set -euxo pipefail
                apt-get update
                apt-get install -y nginx
                systemctl enable nginx
                systemctl restart nginx

  - name: app-url-map
    type: compute.v1.urlMap
    properties:
      defaultService: $(ref.app-backend-service.selfLink)

  - name: app-http-proxy
    type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
    properties:
      urlMap: $(ref.app-url-map.selfLink)

  - name: app-forwarding-rule
    type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
    properties:
      loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL
      portRange: "80"
      IPAddress: $(ref.app-lb-ip.address)
      target: $(ref.app-http-proxy.selfLink)
